title: englerarum montanum
intro: Englerarum montanum, also known as Engler's Mountain Sage, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a shrubby perennial plant with fragrant leaves and purple flowers, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant contains volatile oils with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including sore throats, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The leaves and flowers of Englerarum montanum can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and it is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and soothe the body.
